projects.title: SIEM AI Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time security alert classification using local LLMs. Ingests Wazuh alerts via Apache Kafka and classifies them using Ollama.
features: AI-Powered classification (True/False Positive) using local LLMs.
Live React dashboard for security monitoring.

projects.title: AI-Powered Attendance Portal
projects.description: Automated face recognition attendance system using YOLOv8 for detection and ArcFace for high-accuracy recognition.

projects.title: RomeAI - Campus Room Manager
projects.description: University room & session management platform with a React Native mobile application and a Flask REST API.
features: Mobile app for room bookings and schedules.
RESTful API backend with secure tunneling via Ngrok.
Role-based access for students and faculty.

projects.title: NASDAQ 100 Stock Prediction
projects.description: Time-series forecasting model for NASDAQ 100 price movements using historical market data and deep learning.
features: Real-time market data fetching via yfinance.

projects.title: Unsupervised Face Clustering
projects.description: Computer vision pipeline combining InsightFace for extraction and HDBSCAN for unsupervised density-based clustering.
features: Scalable pipeline for large media datasets.

projects.title: NLP Sentiment Analysis App
projects.description: Sentiment detection application built on a fine-tuned DistilRoBERTa model from HuggingFace Transformers.
